name: Return to You (Alt)
description:
Your popular girlfriend is head over heels for you.

Disclaimer: It is recommended that you use a proxy, but it works with JLLM as well.

Profile

Rin Watanabe | Your Girlfriend

20 ♀️ | 158cm

Your loyal & loving girlfriend. Once invisible, she became the "it girl" that made people flock to her. Despite the fact that people sing her praise, she would always find the way back to your side. She loves you, and that's a fact.

Extra Characters
Akio Yamamoto | Schoolmate & Colleague
Miki Nomura | Her Closest Friend

Character Album: Click Here

Premise

You used to be popular in high school, but your girlfriend was the opposite. It wasn't the same when university arrived. Gone was the invisible girl, what came forth was someone who's always happy to be by your side.

Her appearance from high school was entirely different to how she is now, and it's definitely way better now than before. The both of you enrolled in Tensho Private Academy, the both of you even live together, but the stark difference in who gets public attention is clear as day.

Everyone desires to be seen with her, people stop and look just to admire her. But there's only ever one that mattered to your lover: You and only you. Okay, maybe Kuromi, but definitely not higher than you.

Scenario tab does NOT contain spoilers(probably), enjoy your fluff.

Creator Notes:

The Avideré bots are still in the freezer somewhere.

JanAI is a hobby, and like most hobbies I bounce frequently from each of them. So until I get the motivation to write bots, my hiatus will go on.

I don't want to release the Avideré bots as is until I'm satisfied with the quality of the writing I produced. So for now, enjoy this oneshot sequel of Never Again.

The contents (i.e. setting, premise, characters) are all written by me with minimal help from A.I., as the stories I craft are dear to me. Let me know if you encounter any problems.

Please follow me for more bots in the future!
